creator: mops@punkt.de
text:
Hi folks,

while looking for ports that are officially maintained by our company I found this one. Dorit Rottner does not work for punkt.de, anymore. That's why maintainer approval timed out for the last report.

I was about to suggest we change the maintainer to mops@punkt.de, then found that Jochen asked to take over:
https://bugs.freebsd.org/bugzilla/show_bug.cgi?id=215487

We will gladly give the port to him. Thanks for your work, Jochen.

Kind regards,
Patrick M. Hausen
